query: SELECT ti.*, t.tableId, t.status as tabStatus FROM tab_items ti JOIN tabs t ON ti.tabId = t.id WHERE t.tableId = (SELECT id FROM tables WHERE number = 13 LIMIT 1) ORDER BY ti.orderedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
